# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  
build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Running custom build scripts..."
    - curl --header "Private-Token: <your_access_token>" "https://gitlab.example.com/api/v4/projects/<your_project_id>/trigger/pipeline" | jq .
  only:
    changes:
      - build_script.sh # This file can be updated with the custom commands developers want to execute
